description: A horizontal data-visualization infographic on a white background, styled like a financial-news line chart (clean, professional, restrained). The title in bold black uppercase reads 'INTEL STOCK CUMULATIVE TOTAL RETURN SINCE JAN. 2, 2025'. A single red line traces Intel's cumulative stock return over time, rising sharply to a peak labeled in red text '496.5%' at the right end. The y-axis is labeled in percentages (0, 100, 200, 300, 400, 500%) and the x-axis shows date gridlines: 'JANUARY 2, 2025', 'JULY 1, 2025', 'JANUARY 1, 2026', 'MAY 12, 2026'. A black annotation with a downward arrow points to a mid-2025 inflection: 'AUG. 22, 2025 — THE U.S. GOVERNMENT SECURES A 10% STAKE IN INTEL'. The visual argument credits the Trump administration's government equity stake in Intel with a dramatic stock surge. Messaging technique: a clean chart with a single annotated causal milestone implying the policy drove the gains. No agency seal is visible. Target audience: investors, business press, and the general public, promoting the administration's economic/industrial-policy record.
notable_text: INTEL STOCK CUMULATIVE TOTAL RETURN SINCE JAN. 2, 2025; 496.5%; AUG. 22, 2025 THE U.S. GOVERNMENT SECURES A 10% STAKE IN INTEL
